type BITMODE_BITMODE_Field is
   Val_16Bit,
   Val_08Bit,
   Val_24Bit,
   Val_32Bit)
  with Size => 2;

fields.name: COMPARE0_CLEAR
fields.description: Shortcut between CC[1] event and the CLEAR task.

fields.name: COMPARE1_CLEAR
fields.description: Shortcut between CC[2] event and the CLEAR task.

fields.name: COMPARE2_CLEAR
fields.description: Shortcut between CC[3] event and the CLEAR task.

fields.name: Reserved_4_7
fields.description: Shortcut between CC[0] event and the STOP task.

fields.name: COMPARE0_STOP
fields.description: Shortcut between CC[1] event and the STOP task.

fields.name: COMPARE1_STOP
fields.description: Shortcut between CC[2] event and the STOP task.

fields.name: COMPARE2_STOP
fields.description: Shortcut between CC[3] event and the STOP task.

record_types.name: TIMER_Peripheral

fields.name: TASKS_SHUTDOWN
fields.description: Capture Timer value to CC[n] registers.

fields.name: BITMODE
fields.description:
4-bit prescaler to source clock frequency (max value 9). Source clock
frequency is divided by 2^SCALE.

variables.name: TIMER0_Periph
variables.code:
TIMER0_Periph : aliased TIMER_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => TIMER0_Base;

variables.name: TIMER1_Periph
variables.code:
TIMER1_Periph : aliased TIMER_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => TIMER1_Base;

variables.name: TIMER2_Periph
variables.code:
TIMER2_Periph : aliased TIMER_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => TIMER2_Base;
